name: Frosty Pumpkin Ice Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the ice cream, pumpkin, sugar, and pumpkin pie spice.
2. Stir gently but thoroughly to blend all ingredients.
3. Spread the mixture evenly in the prepared crust.
4. Freeze until firm, at least 1 hour or overnight.
5. To serve, swirl whipped cream decoratively around the edge of the pie.
6. Top with walnut-shaped chocolate candies if desired.
